incident_summary: Operator OP-4215 added double quantity of API Batch to batch C7152C during dispensing. Error not detected until IPC check — quantity 16.6% above specification. Batch placed on hold.
root_cause_detail: Operator did not perform second-check of dispensed quantity before proceeding. Dispensing SOP requires second-operator verification but this step was skipped under time pressure.
corrective_action: Batch rejected — reblending not feasible for this formulation. Operator OP-2491 suspended from dispensing pending retraining on SOP-112. Root cause discussion conducted with team.
preventive_action: Second-operator verification made mandatory at system level — EBR will not allow dispensing step to advance without two distinct operator sign-offs. Supervisory oversight increased during dispensing.
effectiveness_check: Zero dispensing errors over next 6 months. EBR dual sign-off compliance 100% on monthly audit.
